display_text: Ursa Aghanim's Scepter: Allows Enrage to be used while disabled. This is a crucial anti-control upgrade, making Ursa immune to anti-initiation disables like Silence or Hex, guaranteeing maximum damage uptime.
search_text: Ursa Aghanim Scepter anti-disable anti-control silence hex usable while disabled

display_text: Ursa Aghanim's Shard: Earthshock applies 3 Fury Swipes to enemies hit. This upgrade counters AoE damage mitigation and enhances Ursa's crowd control, making him a stronger teamfight presence by rapidly stacking damage on multiple targets.
search_text: Ursa Aghanim Shard Earthshock Fury Swipes AoE damage crowd control teamfight anti-mitigation
